text: In Japanese, how do you say 'Good morning'? {{c1::おはようございます (Ohayō gozaimasu)}}
explanation: Vocabulary for the topic 'Greetings and Farewells'. Level: A1.
usage: Term: おはようございます (Ohayō gozaimasu) | Meaning: Good morning
spanish: ¿Cómo se dice 'Good morning' en Japanese? おはようございます (Ohayō gozaimasu)
